本民前FB

位於觀塘中醫診所「懸壺善學堂」宣布，6月10日至6月12日逃犯條例二讀前，由每位醫師及同事自由決定是否罷工，「其他醫師和姑娘是否上班，本人不會指示亦不負責，是否有同事能接聽電話回應查詢也無法保證。若診療等候時間受影響，冤有頭債有主請出來向踐踏市民意願、危害各位安危的中國香港特區政府追究。同時邀請各公司、機構、個人，勇於採取類似行動以回應。我亦慎重考慮是否要短期內結束一切商業性之業務。」

This is to give notice that in response to the general call to strike on Wednesday, 12 June 2019 against the amendment of the Extradition Bill, Vidler & Co. Solicitors has notified all employees that in the event they wish to act in accordance with their conscience on 12 June 2019 and not attend work in order to go on strike against the Extradition Bill, their action will be supported by the firm.

In order to ensure continuity of our service to our clients and to maintain our duty to the Court, the firm’s offices will however remain open and will be maintained by our principal Mr Michael Vidler.

本行謹此通知，就各界呼籲於2019年6月12日(星期三)為抗議修訂<<2019年逃犯及刑事事宜相互法律協助法例（修訂）條例草案>>罷工，韋智達律師行已通知所有員工，若他們想憑良心行事，並於2019年6月12日因參與罷工而缺勤，本行將予以支持。

To all colleagues,

HK has come to the critical time where we stand on the verge of losing rule of law and freedom to lead a life without worrying a “sword of Damocles” hanging over our shoulder, if the extradition law is passed THIS WEDNESDAY, 12 JUNE 2019.

The protest of 1.03 million people on Sunday clearly meant nothing to the government and this is our LAST CHANCE to save our HOME with our own hands.

I urge that every of you who takes time to read this email reach down to your conscience and ask, if you are willing to sacrifice the future of our HK.
If not, please join me and go on strike on WEDNESDAY !

If you want to know more about the details of the extradition law and our reason to go on strike, please feel free to speak to me and I can share more of the information with you.

From the bottom of my heart,
Your colleagues
